testimonials.title: What Our Patients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences with our platform
testimonials.review1: Online scheduling changed my experience. Fast, practical, and WhatsApp reminders help me never miss an appointment.
testimonials.review2: Telemedicine is fantastic! I can have quality remote consultations without leaving home. The platform is very intuitive.
testimonials.review3: Unified records make everything so much easier. All my exams and consultations in one place. Highly recommend!
